name: Baking Powder Biscuits (Roberts)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour, baking powder, and salt in a mixer.
Mix until crumbly.
2. Add the butter and mix until the dough is crumbly but holds together.
Do not over-mix.
3. Turn the mixture out onto a floured surface.
4. Roll the dough to a thickness of 3/4 inch.
5. Cut into rounds or squares.
6. Place the biscuits close together on an ungreased cookie sheet.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 450°F for 12 to 15 minutes.
